items.description: Crash on I-95 southbound between .5 miles north of Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE and .3 miles south of Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE. There is a lane restriction.
